name: Pecan Pie Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 21 oz. packa (Family size Deluxe Fudge Brownie mix) or any regular brownie recipe that fills a 1 9 x 13 baking pan.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease the bottom only of a 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine and stir in flour until smooth.
4. Add brown sugar and mix in the eggs well.
5. Cook over medium-low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
6. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and pecans. Set aside.
7. In a large bowl, combine brownie ingredients and beat with a spoon until smooth.
8. Spread mixture in prepared pan.
9. Spoon filling evenly over the top.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Do not overbake.
11. Cool completely before cutting into 24 bars.
This recipe is great with a scoop of vanilla ice cream, but only for those who want a delicious brownie treat and not someone counting calories!
